---
title: "Technical Information"
---

<img src="images/main_logo.png" class="centered-image">

## System Overview

GB7CAM runs a LINBPQ-based packet radio node.

---

## Components

- AX.25 packet radio stack  
- LINBPQ switch/router  
- VHF 2m RF interface  

---

## Configuration Notes

- Frequency: 144.950 MHz  
- Mode: AX.25 Packet  
- Antenna: 5m AGL  

---

## Operator Notes

This page is intended for sysops and technical reference.
